hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair, Body Work & Wheel Alignment
hero.subheadline: From minor tune-ups to major collision repair, we deliver precision service that keeps you safe on the road.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Mechanical & Diagnostic Services
featureSections.body: Our ASE-certified technicians use advanced diagnostics to quickly identify and fix issues. From engine repairs to brake service, we keep your car running smoothly.
featureSections.cardBody: We use the latest scan tools to pinpoint problems fast, saving you time and money.

featureSections.title: Expert Body Repairs & Paint Matching
featureSections.body: Our body shop restores your vehicle to pre-accident condition with factory-quality paint and precise panel alignment. We handle everything from minor dents to major collision damage.
featureSections.cardBody: We use premium materials and techniques to ensure your car looks like new.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay ahead of automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide transparent estimates with no hidden fees, so you know exactly what you're paying for.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs are completed within 24 hours, and we offer loaner vehicles to keep you moving.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on All Work
whyChooseUs.description: Every repair and service is backed by a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

testimonials.quote: Ramirez Auto did an amazing job on my car's engine repair. They explained everything clearly and had it done ahead of schedule.
testimonials.author: Mike D.

testimonials.quote: I brought my SUV in for a dent repair and the paint match was perfect. You can't even tell there was damage.
testimonials.author: Linda M.

testimonials.quote: Fair prices, honest work. I've been coming here for years and they never try to upsell me.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online for fast, reliable service.

servicesPage.intro: At Ramirez Auto Repair, Body Shop & Wheel Alignment LLC, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle safe, reliable, and looking its best. From routine maintenance to major collision repair, our skilled technicians use top-tier equipment and genuine parts to deliver lasting results.

services.title: Auto Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Complete mechanical services including engine, transmission, brake, and electrical repairs.
services.longDescription: Our auto repair services cover every system in your vehicle. Using advanced diagnostic tools, we quickly identify issues and perform precise repairs. Whether it's a routine oil change or a complex engine overhaul, we ensure your car runs at peak performance.
benefits: Prevents costly breakdowns with early detection

process.title: Diagnostic Assessment
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and perform a thorough inspection.

process.title: Detailed Estimate
process.description: We provide a written estimate with all costs itemized, including parts and labor, before any work begins.

process.title: Expert Repair & Testing
process.description: Our technicians perform the repair using OEM or equivalent parts, then test the system to ensure everything is working correctly.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual for specific recommendations.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty on all parts and labor for your peace of mind.

services.title: Body Shop & Collision Repair
services.shortDescription: Professional dent repair, paint matching, and full collision restoration.
services.longDescription: Our body shop handles everything from minor scratches to major collision damage. We use computer-guided paint matching and precision tools to restore your vehicle's appearance and structural integrity. Insurance claims are welcome.
benefits: Seamless paint matching for invisible repairs

process.title: Damage Assessment
process.description: We evaluate the extent of damage and provide a detailed repair plan and estimate.

process.title: Body & Frame Repair
process.description: We straighten panels, repair dents, and align the frame to factory specifications.

process.title: Painting & Finishing
process.description: Our technicians apply primer, color-matched paint, and clear coat, then polish to a showroom finish.

faqs.question: How long does a typical collision repair take?
faqs.answer: Minor repairs can be done in a day, while major collision work may take 1-2 weeks depending on parts availability.

faqs.question: Do you work with insurance companies?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with all major insurance providers and can help you file a claim.

services.title: Wheel Alignment & Tire Services
services.shortDescription: Precision wheel alignment, tire rotation, and balancing for a smooth ride.
services.longDescription: Proper wheel alignment is critical for even tire wear, fuel efficiency, and handling. We use state-of-the-art alignment machines to adjust camber, caster, and toe angles to manufacturer specifications. We also offer tire rotation, balancing, and new tire installation.
benefits: Extends tire life and improves safety
Saves fuel by reducing rolling resistance

process.title: Initial Inspection
process.description: We check tire condition, pressure, and suspension components for wear.

process.title: Alignment Adjustment
process.description: Using a computerized alignment rack, we adjust angles to exact specifications.

process.title: Test Drive & Verification
process.description: We take a test drive to ensure the vehicle tracks straight and handles properly.

faqs.question: How do I know if my car needs an alignment?
faqs.answer: Signs include pulling to one side, uneven tire wear, a crooked steering wheel, or vibration while driving.

faqs.question: How often should I get an alignment?
faqs.answer: Every 10,000 miles or whenever you notice handling issues, after hitting a pothole, or after suspension repairs.

services.title: Diagnostic & Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Advanced computer diagnostics and electrical system repair.
services.longDescription: Modern vehicles rely on complex electrical systems. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and repair issues with batteries, alternators, starters, sensors, wiring, and onboard computers. We use OEM-level scan tools to read and interpret fault codes accurately.
benefits: Quickly identifies the root cause of warning lights
Prevents electrical failures that leave you stranded
Restores all electronic features and performance
Compatible with all makes and models

process.title: Code Reading & Analysis
process.description: We connect a professional scan tool to read diagnostic trouble codes and live data.

process.title: System Testing
process.description: We test individual components like the battery, alternator, and sensors to isolate the fault.

process.title: Repair & Reset
process.description: We replace faulty parts and clear codes, then test the system to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: What does the check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We recommend a diagnostic scan to determine the cause.

faqs.question: Can you fix electrical issues on luxury cars?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have the tools and training to work on all makes and models, including luxury and imported vehicles.

about.headline: Dallas's Go-To Auto Care Team
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality automotive repair and body work that keeps our community safe and mobile.
story: Ramirez Auto Repair, Body Shop & Wheel Alignment LLC was founded with a simple mission: deliver expert automotive care with integrity. What started as a small garage has grown into a full-service shop trusted by Dallas drivers for over 15 years. Our founder, a master technician with decades of experience, built the business on the belief that every customer deserves transparent communication, fair pricing, and work that lasts.

Today, our team of ASE-certified mechanics and body specialists serves thousands of vehicles each year. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and training to stay ahead of evolving automotive technology. Whether you need a quick oil change or a complete engine rebuild, we treat every car as if it were our own. We're proud to be a family-owned business that puts people first.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always recommend only necessary repairs and provide clear, upfront pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every job.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority — we listen, explain, and deliver on our promises.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We regularly train on new technologies and techniques to serve you better.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Ramirez Auto
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment.
